revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Year by country category}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d?$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Category other|{{#if: {{{4|}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter]]}}{{#if: {{{prefix|}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter]]}}{{#if: {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]]{{#ifeq: {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe]]}}}}{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]]{{#ifeq: {{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}||[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe]]}}}}}}{{Year in country category/outer core|yearparam={{{year|}}} |yearparamcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{year|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|calcyear={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d?).+$|%1|1|false}}|country = {{{1}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{CountryPrefixThe|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}|continent1 = {{{2|}}}|continent2 = {{{3|}}}|newname= {{{newname|}}}|newnamestart={{{newnamestart|}}}|newnamestartcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{newnamestart|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}|min={{{min|}}}|nocountrycentury={{yesno-no|{{{nocountrycentury|}}}}}|subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}}}|{{Error|ERROR!
[[Template:Year in country category]] no longer supports year parameters. The year is derived automatically from the page title.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Year by country category}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d?$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Category other|{{#if: {{{4|}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter]]}}{{#if: {{{prefix|}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter]]}}{{#if: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]]{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe]]}}}}{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]]{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}||[[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe]]}}}}}}{{Year in country category/outer core|yearparam={{{year|}}} |yearparamcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{year|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|calcyear={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d?).+$|%1|1|false}}|country = {{{1}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}|continent1 = {{{2|}}}|continent2 = {{{3|}}}|newname= {{{newname|}}}|newnamestart={{{newnamestart|}}}|newnamestartcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{newnamestart|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}|min={{{min|}}}|nocountrycentury={{yesno-no|{{{nocountrycentury|}}}}}|subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}}}|{{Error|ERROR!

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 8 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Year by country category}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d?$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Category other|{{#if: {{{4|}}}|}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|}}{{#if: {{{prefix|}}}|}}{{#if: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}|{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|}}}}{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}||}}}}}}{{Year in country category/outer core|yearparam={{{year|}}} |yearparamcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{year|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|calcyear={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d?).+$|%1|1|false}}|country = {{{1}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}|continent1 = {{{2|}}}|continent2 = {{{3|}}}|newname= {{{newname|}}}|newnamestart={{{newnamestart|}}}|newnamestartcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{newnamestart|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}|min={{{min|}}}|nocountrycentury={{yesno-no|{{{nocountrycentury|}}}}}|subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}}}|{{Error|ERROR!
[[Template:Year in country category]] no longer supports year parameters. The year is derived automatically from the page title.}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Distinguish|Template:Year by country category}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d?$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Category other|{{#if: {{{4|}}}|}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|}}{{#if: {{{prefix|}}}|}}{{#if: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}|{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|}}}}{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}||}}}}}}{{Year in country category/outer core|yearparam={{{year|}}} |yearparamcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{year|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|calcyear={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d?).+$|%1|1|false}}|country = {{{1}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}|continent1 = {{{2|}}}|continent2 = {{{3|}}}|newname= {{{newname|}}}|newnamestart={{{newnamestart|}}}|newnamestartcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{newnamestart|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}|min={{{min|}}}|nocountrycentury={{yesno-no|{{{nocountrycentury|}}}}}|subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}}}|{{Error|ERROR!
[[Template:Year in country category]] no longer supports year parameters. The year is derived automatically from the page title.}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Year by country category}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d?$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Category other|{{#if: {{{4|}}}|}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|}}{{#if: {{{prefix|}}}|}}{{#if: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}|{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|}}}}{{#if: {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}|{{#ifeq: {{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}} | {{{prefix|{{{4|}}}}}}||}}}}}}{{Year in country category/outer core|yearparam={{{year|}}} |yearparamcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{year|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|calcyear={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d?).+$|%1|1|false}}|country = {{{1}}}|countrydab = {{{countrydab|}}}|prefix = {{{prefix|{{{4|{{Country prefix the|{{{1|}}}|onlythe=yes}}}}}}}}|continent1 = {{{2|}}}|continent2 = {{{3|}}}|newname= {{{newname|}}}|newnamestart={{{newnamestart|}}}|newnamestartcheck={{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{newnamestart|}}}|^%d%d%d%d?$|1|false}}|0|FAIL|OK}}|nocat={{yesno-no|{{{nocat|}}}}}|min={{{min|}}}|nocountrycentury={{yesno-no|{{{nocountrycentury|}}}}}|subcountry={{yesno-no|{{{subcountry|}}}}}}}|{{Error|ERROR!
[[Template:Year in country category]] no longer supports year parameters. The year is derived automatically from the page title.}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 4th parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with unnamed 5th parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter matching that in CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix available though CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Template Year in country category with prefix parameter NOT matching that in CountryPrefixThe]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
